title: Powerfulparadox's Create Server Pack
description: A pack that was designed for my personal SMP, but might be useful to other Create mod players looking for a Vanilla-ish experience
body:
This pack was designed for my personal Create Fabric SMP server, and released here for the convenience of my players. Other people looking for a (mostly) Vanilla + Create experience might find this enjoyable as well. It has the usual optimization mods, as well as Iris (so shaders are pre-supported). I threw in Krypton and Alternate Current for that almost-Vanilla tweaking of networking and redstone.

Worldgen is fairly basic: Create, Mo'Structures, Profundis, Repurposed Structures, and Waystones are all that add to the Vanilla experience. I was looking for a very lightly tweaked experience (beyond Create, of course), and this does nicely.

There are some QOL tweaks, too, of course, along with some other enhancements (mostly expanding block types, block usage, and so on. Hopefully the surprises (if any) are pleasant ones. I'm aiming for Vanilla + Create with a little extra spice on top.
